faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and professional-grade equipment to safely eliminate wasps while minimizing risk to your family, pets, and the environment. faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Massapequa, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Massapequa commonly sees yellow jackets, paper wasps, bald-faced hornets, and European hornets. These species build nests in various locations including under eaves, in trees, underground, and within wall voids. Our technicians are experienced in identifying and safely removing all wasp species found on Long Island.
